abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: From Shadow
abilities.text: This model is deployed during the start phase of turn 1 anywhere on the table, not within 2" of a Strategy marker or enemy deployment zone.

abilities.name: Icy Form
abilities.text: This model is considered an Ice Pillar marker for the purposes of the Ice Mirror ability.

actions.name: Icy Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Staggered token, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Freeze Over
triggers.text: Once per turn. This model heals 3.

triggers.name: Blank Stare
triggers.text: Discard a card. Target gains a Slow token and must discard a card.

actions.name: Jagged Ice
actions.effects: Target an Ice Pillar marker. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Mummified in Ice
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker within 1" of the Ice Pillar marker.
